task_completion.description: Verify that the CT Cranium DICOM scan is loaded and visible in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The InVesalius interface should display the axial, coronal, and sagittal views of a brain CT scan in its main viewing panels.

task_completion.description: Verify the window width (W) and window level (L) have been adjusted for brain parenchyma visualization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text overlays on the scan images or values in the contrast/brightness panel showing Window Width (W) approximately 80 (must be ≤ 250) and Window Level (L) approximately 40.

task_completion.description: Verify a new segmentation mask has been created on the scan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A colored overlay (the mask) should be visible on the CT scan images, and a new mask entry should be present in the 'Masks' or 'Segmentation' list panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the segmentation mask uses a soft tissue or muscle tissue threshold preset with a maximum HU ≤ 300.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the threshold adjustment panel or mask properties. The upper bound (maximum value) of the selected threshold range must be 300 or less.

task_completion.description: Verify the project is saved to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main application window title should display 'brain_study.inv3', or a 'Save As' dialog should be visible confirming the file is being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/brain_study.inv3'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the InVesalius graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the mouse cursor interacting with InVesalius menus, sliders, and buttons, rather than terminal commands or scripts executing the changes.

integrity.description: Verify the file was saved using the application's actual save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save operation should occur via the InVesalius 'File -> Save Project As' dialog, not by manually moving/renaming files in a terminal or file manager.

integrity.description: Verify the threshold and window levels were adjusted within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The threshold and window level values should be visible in the application's native input fields, sliders, or preset dropdowns.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target save path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/brain_study.inv3'. The window width (W) must be adjusted to approximately 80 HU (acceptable success range is W ≤ 250 HU) and window level (L) to approximately 40 HU. The segmentation mask must have a maximum threshold value (HU) of 300 or less (corresponding to Soft Tissue or Muscle Tissue presets).
